name: Kapiolani Park Playground
tagline: Huge banyan-shaded playground steps from Waikiki — the go-to for hotel families who need a playground break.
parking: Free parking along Monsarrat Ave and park side streets; metered spots on Kalakaua
bestTime: Mornings or late afternoon for shade and cooler temps; weekdays for less crowds
talkStory: Great for ages 1-8. The playground sits under massive banyan trees that provide natural shade — huge win in Hawaii heat. Multiple play structures for different age groups. The surrounding park is perfect for bike riding, picnics, and kite flying. Saturday mornings have a farmers market at KCC nearby. Walk to the zoo, aquarium, or beach in minutes. Restrooms available in the park. Bring a blanket for lounging while keiki play.
